ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOT($Permission.AttributeSurveyPermission), ISPICKVAL( ApprovalStatus__c , "未申請") , $Profile.Name <> "システム管理者", $Profile.Name <> "部門管理者", $Profile.Name <> "データ移行管理者", Owner:User.Id <> $User.Id, Owner:User.ManagerId <> $User.Id, Owner:User.Manager.ManagerId <> $User.Id, Owner:User.ConcurrentManager__c <> $User.Id, Owner:User.ConcurrentManager__r.ConcurrentManager__c <> $User.Id )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 編集権限がないため編集できません
